claims.title: Research Fellow  Geospatial AI & Remote Sensing
claims.details: Jun 2024  Aug 2024 Defence Research and Development Lab (DRDL), DRDO India Built geospatial anomaly detection models for border surveillance using satellite imagery and multi-temporal land-change analysis with ArcGIS, QGIS, and Google Earth Engine. Performed feature extraction, risk modelling, and data preprocessing on large-scale remote sensing datasets to support defense intelli- gence workows. Co-authored research published in IJERT (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18441874); delivered technical reports for the DRDO project team.

claims.title: DRDO Representative  Industrial Training
claims.details: Jun 2024 Low Emissions Carbon Pathway Program India Represented DRDO in cross-organizational technical sessions on sustainable development, environmental impact assessment, and low- emission strategies. Contributed to collaborative discussions on carbon reduction pathways with multi-disciplinary engineering teams.

claims.title: Scenario-Driven Land Change Anomaly Assessment for Border Surveillance
claims.details: DRDO, Jul 2024  Aug 2025 | Published Designed an ML pipeline for detecting land-cover anomalies in satellite imagery using GIS and Remote Sensing tools for defense border surveillance. Applied multi-temporal feature extraction and spatial risk modelling across large geospatial datasets to identify statistically signicant change patterns. Research published in IJERT; full citation at DOI: zenodo.18441874.

claims.title: Physics-Informed IoT-Based Real-Time Drone Detection System
claims.details: Python, YOLOv8, OpenCV, ESP32 Engineered a real-time drone detection system using YOLOv8 and OpenCV on live video streams, achieving high precision in distin- guishing drones from birds via physics-informed motion ltering (speed, trajectory, stability). Reduced false positive rate signicantly by integrating kinematic constraints into the object classication post-processing stage. Deployed an IoT alert layer using ESP32 microcontrollers and Telegram API for automated real-time threat notications. Built a complete end-to-end pipeline covering video ingestion, detection, classication, and alert dispatch; validated on real-world footage and a custom-annotated dataset.
